why_it_matters: An active emergency epinephrine auto-injector should be captured in the completed medication review, as it reflects an anaphylaxis-risk allergy history and affects prescription continuity.
Documenting the absence of recent allergic reactions and no EpiPen use is a relevant pertinent negative given her allergy profile but has low immediate clinical impact.
Medicaid status is directly relevant to this visit's referrals and cost-related access issues (dental, medications), influencing care coordination decisions.
